choices.text: Heartbeat: Pine fires alert every hour; endpoint updates last_alive_at; external monitor (UptimeRobot) alerts if no heartbeat >2 hours. Without it, pipelines die silently.

questions.explanation: Heartbeat alerts + external monitor = pipeline health.

choices.text: Kill switch: endpoint checks KV/database flag before placing orders; toggle via admin endpoint or Discord bot command. Instant halt regardless of incoming alerts. Critical when strategy misbehaves.

questions.explanation: Kill switch in endpoint = instant halt mechanism.
